fills: Tabel 4.6 / T8d — fair warmed BKT on ASSISTments-2009 per window
unavailable_reason: No stored artifact contains a per-window FAIR-WARMED (individualized-prior / leak-free population-prior-init) BKT result on ASSISTments-2009. The only warmed/individualized-prior BKT probe that exists (scripts/probe_coldstart_beat_bkt.py + scripts/probe_coldstart_powered.py, report COLDSTART_BEAT_BKT_2026-06-05.md) is HARDCODED to the Junyi-graph sealed run run-94a3b8ba (RUN constant + ex_junyi_graph_* eval users on lines 23-28 of probe_coldstart_beat_bkt.py) — it does NOT cover ASSIST-2009. Producing the ASSIST-2009 fair-warmed BKT cells requires a probe_coldstart_beat_bkt-style warmed-BKT run parameterized to ASSIST-2009, which is a NEW probe run and is not present on disk. Per the hard rules a new brain run / re-seal is forbidden; this slot is left UNAVAILABLE rather than fabricated.

what_exists_instead_for_assist2009.note: These are STANDARD (flat/online) BKT, NOT the fair-warmed/individualized-prior BKT the slot asks for. Recorded here only to document availability — do NOT substitute them for the warmed-BKT cells.

scale_sweep_bkt.note: ASSIST-2009 BKT (online/standard, NOT warmed) per N x window also exists here; see pass04. Not the fair-warmed BKT either.

to_fill_this_slot: Run a warmed/individualized-prior BKT probe (the probe_coldstart_beat_bkt.py mechanism: leak-free per-concept population prior P(L0) as the BKT init, eval split disjoint) parameterized to dataset_id=assistments_2009_skill over EXISTING recorded ASSIST-2009 data (read-only over experiment_trajectories for the ASSIST-2009 runs). This is a read-only re-score of already-recorded data and would NOT generate a new brain run/seal — but it is not yet materialized as an artifact, so it is marked UNAVAILABLE here per the no-new-run discipline.
framing: When filled, frame as: warmed BKT is the FAIR/strong baseline (individualized prior init, not flat 0.20) so the comparison is honest; AUC is competitive not superior.
